parsed.explanation: Corrected XML structure by removing a malformed closing </TITLE> tag inside the first BIBL element and adding missing <BIBL> wrapper tags for the Fleury entry. Normalized OCR artifacts and encoding errors (e.g., \u221a, \u00b) to standard German characters (Brandmüllerischen, verständigen, Haus-Väter, französisch, etc.). Fixed spelling errors such as 'Sub. scriptionen' to 'Subscriptionen', 'Folianten' to 'Folianten', and 'ubersetzt' to 'übersetzt'.
